title: Deterministic Associated Datasets, Curation, and Evaluation Selection
description:
## Summary
Make score optimization repeatable with deterministic associated datasets, explicit curation, and evaluation-selection rules.

## Scope
- Associated datasets are DataSet artifacts linked to a score via DataSet.scoreId.
- Selection is association-only with deterministic newest-first ordering.
- Curation builds deterministic, single-score datasets from vetted labels.
- Evaluation becomes source-agnostic once the dataset exists.

## Key assumptions
- The benchmark is always the associated DataSet artifact, never live upstream source objects.
- Labels are snapshotted into the dataset artifact at build time.
- Schema-budget cleanup may be required before the preferred curation model can ship.

## Notes
Keep this epic separate from RCA reliability and misclassification triage workstreams.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Epic is now active. Current implementation is running in child task plx-cc3cf3 (deterministic single-score reference dataset builds), with completed dependencies: plx-6466e1, plx-818f07, plx-ff6ca4, plx-89660a, plx-25e99b, plx-602664.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text:
Progress checkpoint:
- Deterministic reference dataset model/API surfaces, deterministic label-resolution policy, dataset build/assignment CLI, evaluation integration, value function, and acceptance policy are implemented and passing targeted tests.
- Public docs task (plx-a78f02) has been implemented and validated, pending final commit/merge closure.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text:
New child task opened: plx-781254

Purpose: simplify reference dataset handling to one DataSet-owned path (no role pointers, no role selector), with strict frozen-only selection and deterministic newest-first resolution.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text:
Progress from child task plx-781254:
- Reference dataset selection simplified to one DataSet-owned path (scoreId + isReferenceFrozen + newest-first ordering).
- Role-based score pointers and dataset role tagging removed from active code paths and docs.
- Accuracy CLI now uses --use-score-reference and optional --all-score-references.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: plx-781254 update: removed frozen terminology and completed hard-cut rename to reference-dataset terminology across schema, CLI, resolver logic, tests, and docs (no compatibility aliases).

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Architecture terminology cleanup: active implementation now uses association-only semantics (DataSet.scoreId) and operator language should use 'associated dataset'. This epic title was updated to match shipped behavior and avoid marker/role confusion.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: plx-2efd16 completed and closed. Vetted+balanced associated dataset curation pipeline is now report-evidence-first via score dataset-curate-vetted, with runtime validation on 1039/45425 and sub-task closures recorded.
